title: Remove local MLB origination code from sports_bot_v2 and decouple execution gating from mlb_model
objective: Remove the gated local MLB decision path from sports_bot_v2/bot_core.py and decouple execution-style gating from mlb_model. Work in two clearly separated tiers. Do not touch the bridge execution path, model_bridge.py, or any file not listed below.
context: AUTHORITY_SEPARATION_AUDIT_001 identified 8 violations across 5 files. sports_bot_v2 violations are inactive (gated by ALLOW_LOCAL_MLB_ORIGINATION=0) and safe to remove. mlb_model violations are active — execution gating logic currently lives inside the model layer and must be decoupled carefully. The intended architecture: mlb_model emits recommendation + metadata only; sports_bot_v2 enforces all execution gates. model_bridge.py and bot_core.py bridge path (lines 560-637) are already correct and must not be touched.
do_not_touch: C:\Users\johnny\Desktop\sports_bot_v2\bot_core.py lines 560-637 — bridge execution path, do not touch
Any file not listed in allowed_files above

tier_1_low_risk.description: Remove gated local MLB origination path from sports_bot_v2 — these lines are dead by default (ALLOW_LOCAL_MLB_ORIGINATION=0) and safe to remove

items.target_lines: 113 (ALLOW_LOCAL_MLB_ORIGINATION env read) and 441-478 (entire local origination block: gate check + date gate + signal generation + local entry gating)
items.action: Remove the full local origination block (lines 441-478) and the ALLOW_LOCAL_MLB_ORIGINATION config line (line 113). The bridge path at 560-637 is the sole survivor.
items.constraint: Do not remove or alter any line in the bridge path block (560-637). Verify the loop still runs correctly after removal by reading the surrounding context.

items.action: Remove the MLB-specific local decision path. Before removing, read lines 1-105 and 270+ to confirm no non-MLB sport still calls these functions. If another sport still calls them, remove only the MLB branch and leave the rest intact — do not break other sports.
items.constraint: Read the full file first. Only remove what is exclusively MLB. Do not remove any shared utility functions.

tier_2_coordination.description: Decouple execution gating from mlb_model — these are active code paths; be precise and minimal

items.action: Remove ROLLBACK_DISABLE global and its early-return guard. New-entry lifecycle control belongs in sports_bot_v2, not in the model. The model should always emit its best recommendation.
items.constraint: Confirm no other part of recommendation_api.py references ROLLBACK_DISABLE before removing.

items.action: Remove the import of check_all_gates/check_size_tier/compute_confidence from execution_guard. Remove the check_all_gates call and its result handling (lines 187-212). The model should return its recommendation and confidence metadata unconditionally — bot_core/model_bridge enforces execution gates on the receiving side.
items.constraint: After removing the gate call, verify the recommendation return path still reaches the caller cleanly. Do not leave dangling variable references. Read lines 180-240 for full context before editing.

items.action: After removing all imports and call sites in recommendation_api.py above, delete or empty this file. If deleting, confirm no other mlb_model file imports from it first (grep for 'execution_guard' across the mlb_model directory before deleting).
items.constraint: Do not delete this file until the import in recommendation_api.py line 105 is already removed. Verify no other mlb_model file imports it.

execution_order: 1. Complete tier_1 first (bot_core.py + signal_base.py). These are independent of tier_2.
2. Then complete tier_2 in this order: MLB-004 (ROLLBACK_DISABLE) → MLB-001+MLB-002 (import + gate call removal) → MLB-003 (execution_guard.py deletion, only after imports are gone).
3. Do not interleave tier_1 and tier_2 edits.
deliverables: List of exact files changed with before/after line ranges for each edit
Confirmation that signal_base.py MLB path was removed without breaking other sports
Confirmation that execution_guard.py has no remaining importers before deletion
Confirmation that bot_core.py bridge path (560-637) is untouched
Any residual risks or deferred items

bot_core.py bridge path (560-637) compiles and is logically unchanged
signal_base.py MLB decision engine removed or MLB branch isolated
recommendation_api.py no longer imports or calls execution_guard functions
execution_guard.py deleted or emptied with no remaining importers
No other allowed file has unresolved references to removed symbols
verification: After edits: read bot_core.py loop section to confirm bridge path still intact
After edits: grep mlb_model directory for 'execution_guard' — expect zero results
After edits: grep sports_bot_v2 for 'ALLOW_LOCAL_MLB_ORIGINATION' — expect zero results
Report any import errors or broken references found during review
rollback: Revert only the files listed in allowed_files. All changes are removals of dead or decoupled code — reverting restores prior state exactly. A bot restart is required for changes to take effect.
restart_note: After this task is reviewed and approved, a full stack restart is required before the cleanup takes effect at runtime.
status: OPEN — waiting for DASHBOARD_TRUTH_REVERIFY_001 to complete before pickup
